generationMethod.note: Higgsfield did not expose a true mask-inpaint parameter here. These are whole-frame reference generations using the AXB work canvas and mask as input images; anchors are not pixel-guaranteed.

candidates.notes: Darker, smoother valley-to-dusk transition; keeps visible AXB-like anchors at the outer edges.
candidates.reviewNotes: External dawn/dusk joins benefit from copied edge anchors, but the internal anchor-to-X boundary forms visible orange/blue vertical bands. Not selector-ready.
candidates.label: HF NB2 AXB 01

candidates.notes: Brighter, lower-contrast atmospheric bridge. Marked active-for-review in the dashboard, not accepted as final.
candidates.reviewNotes: Softer and lower contrast than 01, but still has obvious internal warm-to-blue banding and no pixel-preserved anchors. Not selector-ready.
candidates.label: HF NB2 AXB 02
GPT AXB 01
candidates.notes: Imported GPT image edit from the 1:4:1 AXB workflow. Raw full-frame candidate; anchors are not assumed pixel-exact.
candidates.reviewNotes: Strongest standalone semantic AXB transition so far, with a natural warm-to-cool mountain bridge. Not accepted as final because outer anchors are not pixel-exact after GPT generation and resize.

reviewSummary.internalJoinVerdict: Natural X concept, but outer anchors are not exact.

candidates.label: GPT AXB 01 X-only
candidates.notes: Derived from GPT AXB 01 by extracting only X and compositing exact original A/B anchors back in. Outer anchor diff verified at 0.
candidates.reviewNotes: Outer plate-facing anchors are exact, but hard X-only compositing creates visible internal anchor-to-X discontinuities. Useful diagnostic, not accepted final adapter.

reviewSummary.internalJoinVerdict: Exact outer anchors; hard A-X / X-B cuts are visible.

candidates.label: GPT AXB 01 soft64
candidates.notes: Derived from gpt-axb-01. A/B anchors are copied exactly; only X-region pixels are softened over 64px near the anchors.
candidates.reviewNotes: Strictly preserves original A/B anchors and blends only inside X. Review at blend=0 before accepting.

reviewSummary.internalJoinVerdict: Exact anchors; internal blend still reads hard.

candidates.label: GPT AXB 01 soft128
candidates.notes: Derived from gpt-axb-01. A/B anchors are copied exactly; only X-region pixels are softened over 128px near the anchors.
candidates.reviewNotes: Strictly preserves original A/B anchors and blends only inside X. Review at blend=0 before accepting.

reviewSummary.internalJoinVerdict: Exact anchors; internal blend is reduced but still visible.

candidates.label: GPT AXB 01 soft256
candidates.notes: Derived from gpt-axb-01. A/B anchors are copied exactly; only X-region pixels are softened over 256px near the anchors.
candidates.reviewNotes: Strictly preserves original A/B anchors and blends only inside X. Review at blend=0 before accepting.

reviewSummary.internalJoinVerdict: Exact anchors; smoothest pre-sweep strict-X candidate.

candidates.label: GPT AXB 01 linear 128
candidates.notes: Derived from gpt-axb-01. A/B anchors are copied exactly; only X-region pixels are softened over 128px near the anchors with a linear curve.
candidates.reviewNotes: Strictly preserves original A/B anchors and blends only inside X. Review at blend=0 before accepting.

reviewSummary.internalJoinVerdict: Exact anchors; narrower blend leaves more internal banding.

candidates.notes: Derived from gpt-axb-01. A/B anchors are copied exactly; only X-region pixels are softened over 192px near the anchors with a linear curve.

candidates.notes: Derived from gpt-axb-01. A/B anchors are copied exactly; only X-region pixels are softened over 256px near the anchors with a linear curve.
candidates.reviewNotes: Strictly preserves original A/B anchors and blends only inside X. Review at blend=0 before accepting.

reviewSummary.internalJoinVerdict: Exact anchors; balanced sweep candidate, similar to soft256.

candidates.label: GPT AXB 01 linear 384
candidates.notes: Derived from gpt-axb-01. A/B anchors are copied exactly; only X-region pixels are softened over 384px near the anchors with a linear curve.
candidates.reviewNotes: Strictly preserves original A/B anchors and blends only inside X. Review at blend=0 before accepting.

reviewSummary.internalJoinVerdict: Exact anchors; wider blend reduces right band but muddies left A-X transition.

candidates.label: Manual smoke identity
candidates.notes: Smoke test for manual X-only import using the exported work canvas as the external full image. Not a visual candidate.
candidates.reviewNotes: External output was treated as X source only. Original A/B anchors were composited back from the manual work canvas; outside-X diff is verified at 0.

reviewSummary.internalJoinVerdict: Manual X-only import; exact A/B anchors restored. Inspect A-X and X-B at blend=0.

candidates.label: Photoshop test 1
candidates.notes: Manual Photoshop web test. External full image used as X source only; original A/B anchors composited back by repo.
candidates.reviewNotes: External output was treated as X source only. Original A/B anchors were composited back from the manual work canvas; outside-X diff is verified at 0.

reviewSummary.internalJoinVerdict: Manual X-only import; exact A/B anchors restored. Inspect A-X and X-B at blend=0.

reviewVerdict: PARTIAL CURRENT BEST. gpt-axb-01-soft256 remains the active strict-X review candidate. The 128/192/256/384/512 x linear/smoothstep/cosine sweep preserved anchors but did not find a clearly better visual candidate; wider blends reduce the right-side band while muddying the left-side A-X transition.
